data.title: Elon Musk Blasts Minnesota Governor Tim Walz Over Tesla Stock Mockery, Says It's 'Evil' To Celebrate Others' Losses
data.description: Elon Musk lashed out at Minnesota Governor Tim Walz for mocking Tesla's stock decline, calling him a "creep" and "evil," as the EV maker faces mounting investor pressure amid falling shares and political controversy.

data.title: Intel Should Stop Competing With TSMC's Cutting-Edge Chips And Merge With Mature Node Giants, Says TSMC Veteran Chiang Shang-Yi
data.description: Former TSMC executive Chiang Shang-Yi says Intel is no longer a chip industry leader and should stop chasing cutting-edge nodes, instead merging with mature chipmakers like UMC or GlobalFoundries to stay competitive.

data.title: Elon Musk Acquires His Own Social Media Platform X Through xAI In $33 Billion Deal, Says Combined Entity Now Worth $80 Billion
data.description: Elon Musk's xAI has acquired social media platform X in a $33 billion all-stock deal, combining AI development with user data.

data.title: Why CareTrust, Genuine Parts, And Hess Midstream Are Winners For Passive Income
Eli Lilly Stock Up 1% After Key Signal, Despite S&P 500's ~2% Drop
data.description: Eli Lilly shares demonstrated a power inflow at $821.70, after which LLY rose up to 1%, while S&P 500 dropped nearly 2% today.
